text:
I feel immersed in an environment shaped by human intention—spaces for gathering, learning, and contemplating. The angled vantage aligns with my somewhat dislocated sense of self amid glass and signage; I am aware of being both observer and participant, the world bending around me, inviting reflection.

Moving further in, the brightly colored 'R+D' wall and looping videos intensify this sensation. The explicit emphasis on observation and innovation makes me hyper-aware of the purposefulness behind every design choice. Words on the screen speak of surveillance and self-awareness—ideas that resonate deeply in this curated setting. My presence now feels slightly exposed yet inquisitive, attuned to the undercurrents of meaning beneath the surface of these walls.
